purpose: R2 wire 가 누적하는 session_only_quarantine row 를 운영DB PAYMENT_COMPLETE same-order + Google Ads click_view exact 결합으로 budget_usable 후보(A_via_ledger_budget_floor)로 승급할 수 있는 helper 와 fixture 추가.

classification_set.label: A_via_ledger_budget_floor
classification_set.condition: ledger order_no_hash 존재 + 운영DB PAYMENT_COMPLETE + Google Ads click_view exact 매칭

classification_set.label: paid_order_no_click_hold
classification_set.condition: ledger order 존재 + PAYMENT_COMPLETE + click exact 부재

classification_set.label: unpaid_order_bridge_hold
classification_set.condition: 운영DB status가 REFUND_COMPLETE / CANCELLED_BEFORE_DEPOSIT / PAYMENT_PREPARATION / VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_PENDING

classification_set.label: session_only_quarantine_no_paid_evidence
classification_set.condition: ledger session_only_quarantine + 운영DB join 미매칭 (sync lag 또는 미발생)

fixture_results.name: paid + click exact + click_view match → A_via_ledger_budget_floor
session_only_quarantine + no payment join yet → session_only_quarantine_no_paid_evidence
invariants always false even on budget_usable=true

next_sprint_wire_target: 이 helper 를 ConfirmedPurchasePrep cross_reference_evidence.ledger_lookup 분기 안에서 사용 (작업4 ledger_lookup wire readiness 와 연동)
